nasb.text: Furthermore, Ahithophel said to Absalom, “Please let me choose 12,000 men that I may arise and pursue David tonight.

esv.text: Moreover, Ahithophel said to Absalom, “Let me choose twelve thousand men, and I will arise and pursue David tonight.

cnv.text: 亞希多弗又對押沙龍說：“求你准我挑選一萬二千人，今晚我要動身去追趕大衛，

ccb.text: 亚希多弗对押沙龙说：“让我挑选一万二千人，今夜启程追赶大卫，
